title: PackUK: Recyclability assessment methodology (RAM) roadmap 2025 to 2030
body: "The Recyclability Assessment Methodology (RAM) roadmap provides a forward look of planned developments of the RAM between 2025-2030.  It covers planned annual policy alignment reviews, RAM publication timings, key materials updates and industry engagements, such as the quarterly RAM Technical Advisory Committee.  All timings in the roadmap are subject to change. "
